name: lever-hiring-signals
description: Read public Lever postings and convert open roles into sales, recruiting, or account-growth signals.
business_value: No-key hiring intent and growth-trigger monitoring.

inputs.name: site
inputs.note: Lever company site token, such as 'anchorage'.

auth.note: Uses Lever's public postings API only.

verification_result: Live smoke checked Lever public postings for 'anchorage' and received job rows without an API key.
known_risks: Filtering fields vary by employer data quality.
